LanguageData.ARA_Basic_Start_Scenario.label: Arachne Hive-Titan Tentacles
LanguageData.ARA_Basic_Start_Scenario.description:
An Arachne insect queen, the Titan species, landed in the desolate edge world, preparing to build her own insect nest. 

Titan Tentacles
The Titan Tentacles are the main legion of the Arachne Swarm. They include the toughest and most adaptable group among the Arachne Swarm, and are responsible for maintaining the front line on the battlefield. The insect swarms under this branch have balanced offensive and defensive capabilities and are good at destroying opponents in head-to-head combat.
